title: a lot of diamonds
description: makes diamonds a lot less rare
body:
Description:

Unlock the true potential of your mining adventures with the Diamond Deluge mod! This exciting enhancement increases the spawn rate of diamonds in your Minecraft world, making these coveted gems easier to find than ever before.

Features:

Enhanced Diamond Generation: Diamonds now spawn in greater quantities across various layers of the overworld,they don't just spawn more however, they  can spawn as high as Y80 and as low as  Y-64! Whether you're digging deep or exploring caves, you’ll discover more sparkling treasures!

New Diamond Veins: Experience the thrill of discovering larger diamond veins, with clusters of up to 90 diamonds in a single block formation. This means fewer hours mining and more time crafting! (as far as I know)

Compatibility: this datapack is designed to work seamlessly with other mods or datapacks and can be used in both single-player and multiplayer environments. Enjoy a "balanced" experience without disrupting the vanilla gameplay.


With this pack, you’ll never look at mining the same way again. Get ready to fill your inventory with diamonds and create the ultimate gear to conquer your Minecraft world! Download now and dive into a diamond-filled adventure!

(this description was not written by an ai)
